nasb.text: O Lord, the God of Abraham, Isaac and Israel, our fathers, preserve this forever in the intentions of the heart of Your people, and direct their heart to You;

esv.text: O Lord, the God of Abraham, Isaac, and Israel, our fathers, keep forever such purposes and thoughts in the hearts of your people, and direct their hearts toward you.

cnv.text: 耶和華我們列祖亞伯拉罕、以撒、以色列的　神啊，求你永遠保守這一件事，就是使你的子民常存這心思意念，堅定他們的心歸向你。

ccb.text: 我们祖先亚伯拉罕、以撒、以色列的上帝耶和华啊！求你使你的子民常存这样的心志，使他们的心忠于你。
